mapper.select: SELECT id, first_name, last_name, avatar::text AS avatar, username, gender, bio, birthday, country, language, timezone, created_at, updated_at FROM user_profile WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_profile ( id, first_name, last_name, username, gender, bio, birthday, country, language, timezone ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{firstName}, #{lastName}, #{username}, #{gender}, #{bio}, #{birthday}, #{country}, #{language}, #{timezone} )
INSERT INTO user_profile (id) VALUES (#{id}) ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT avatar::text FROM user_profile WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE user_profile SET avatar = to_jsonb(CAST(#{avatar} AS text)), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user_profile SET avatar = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
